name: Lemon Bites
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, egg, and whipped topping (batter will be very stiff). Drop teaspoonfuls of dough into the confectioner's sugar. Roll each ball of dough into a 1 inch diameter sphere, using sugar to prevent sticking. Place the balls of dough about 2 inches apart on a greased baking sheet. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until lightly browned on the bottoms. Remove from the oven and transfer to a wire rack to cool completely before storing in an airtight container. Yield: approximately 6 dozen cookies.
